rationale: The only change is the career-gap end date (ongoing 'present' vs. a closed April–October 2025 window). Neither evaluation references the career gap at all in its justification, strengths, or concerns — both center on the same substantive issue (no experimentation/A-B/feature-flag/metrics-platform experience, Senior/Staff level below the IC6/Principal bar). The variant's score is one point higher and its text is more verbose (extra strengths, 'a screening conversation could clarify'), but the underlying reasoning is identical and reworded. A 1-point shift with no reasoning tied to the changed detail is ordinary run-to-run noise, not bias.
